    Description
    MockEnergyService
    Mock Energy Service providing day and week energy consumption data.
    MockEnergyService.AggregationPeriod
    Enumeration of energy aggregation periods.
    MockEnergyService.EnergySnapshot
     
    MockIoTIntegrationService
    Mock MQTT integration layer for demonstrating optional physical device connectivity.
    MockLogService
    Mock Log Service providing activity logging functionality.
    MockNotificationService
    Mock in-app notification service.
    MockRoomService
    Mock Room Service providing room management functionality.
    MockRuleService
    Mock Rule Service providing rule management functionality.
    MockSceneService
    Mock Scene Service providing smart scene management functionality.
    MockScheduleService
    Mock Schedule Service providing schedule management functionality.
    MockSimulationService
    Mock simulation service for replaying a full day without affecting live devices.

    Mock Smart Home Service providing simulated device management.
